scan_notes: DAG consistency: all 7 nodes verified, waves respected. Writer compliance: each file in output/integration/ has a single producer section per manifest.json. Contract coverage: 6 contracts in contracts/original/ all have producer + consumer sections that shipped real code. OOS drift: no player-level / gambling / fantasy / ticket / auth / logo / minor-league / i18n drift detected in the 7 integration files (sampled via runtime tests S1.A4.* + import-boundary check + manual grep). 46/46 edge-case-testing static-fidelity assertions pass. Live-data assertions deferred to CV per test-plan.md.

detail: Every file under output/integration/ has exactly one source_section + source_builder per manifest.json (ui-shell→index.html+styles.css, ui-render→app.js, data-client→data-client.js+teams.js, trends-engine→trends-engine.js, rankings-engine→rankings-engine.js). Coordinator wrote build-complete.json and dag.json under state/coordinator/. Editor wrote review-v1.json. Discovery and TD wrote ledger-v1.json and sections-v1.json. Each contract under contracts/original/ has a producer + consumer pair that shipped code. Inline-mode authorized-writer rule honored.

Full keyword sweep across all 7 integration files (stripe, paypal, fantasy, draft, ticket, purchase, login, auth, signup, register, subscribe, logo file, headshot, push notif, service worker, websocket, backend, express, node-server, betting, gambling, wager, spread, moneyline, odds, sportsbook, draftkings, fanduel, stubhub, seatgeek, vivid, OAuth, firebase, sendgrid, simulation, monteCarlo, playoffOdds, chart.js, chartjs, d3, echarts, plotly, highcharts, tailwind, bootstrap framework, bulma, foundation, espn, cdn/unpkg/jsdelivr/googleapis/cdnjs, mlbstatic, i18n/intl/translate, /people/, /roster/, /playByPlay, /liveGame, /gumbo, playerPool). Two 'bootstrap' hits are word-sense (program initialization comment + section header 'BOOTSTRAP'); no Bootstrap CSS framework reference (no bootstrap.css/bootstrap.min/getbootstrap link). statsapi.mlb.com appears only in data-client.js source + an <a href> credit in index.html footer — S1.A4 scope is JS files except data-client, so footer link is compliant.

ledger-v1.json: version, telos, restatement, execution_context_observed, proper_nouns (2), assumption_ledger (11), inflection_points (8), first_contact_requirements (7), out_of_scope (15) — all present. sections-v1.json: version, inflection_resolutions (11), prompt_verb_analysis, discovery_coverage_assertions (44), prompt_named_verb_assertion (PNV.1), sections (6) — all present. review-v1.json: version, verdict (pass_with_recommendations), findings (2), routed_to ([]), recommendations (2) — all present. build-complete.json: created_at, all_sections_verified=true, integrator_verified=true, edge_case_testing_verified=true, sections_verified[] with timestamps, ready_for_cv=true — all present. manifest.json: created_at, entry_point=index.html, files[] (7), module_graph, contracts_satisfied[] (6) — all present.

All 6 DAG sections (data-client, ui-shell, trends-engine, rankings-engine, ui-render, edge-case-testing) have state files with status=verified, output builder directories with code + metadata, and matching state/reports/builder-*-v1.json entries. Wave order honored per build-complete.json: wave1 (data-client+ui-shell), wave2 (engines), wave3 (ui-render), wave4 (integrator), wave5 (edge-case-testing).

All 11 inflection_resolutions verified. IP1.M1 PASS: data-client API_BASE constant = 'https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1'; all 4 fetch URL templates use this prefix. IP1.M2 PASS: no espn/sports-data-api refs. IP2.M1 PASS: app.js init() invokes fetchStandings + fetchSchedule + fetchRecentResults via Promise.all. IP2.M2 PASS: no snapshot JSON files in integration dir. IP3.M1 PASS: no /people, /roster, playerPool refs. IP4.M1 PASS: fetchRecentResults uses daysAgoISO(days-1) → today inclusive 7-day window. IP5.M1 PASS: app.js calls fetchSchedule(today, daysAheadISO(7)). IP6.M1 PASS: live computeRankings() invocation against 30-team fixture returns object with exactly 6 division keys (AL_Central,AL_East,AL_West,NL_Central,NL_East,NL_West) and wildCard.AL.length=3, wildCard.NL.length=3. IP7.M1 PASS: app.js renderUpcoming sets 'No games scheduled in the next 7 days.' empty-state. IP8.M1 PASS: no team-logo image files, no mlbstatic href. IP8.M2 PASS: 30 --team-* CSS custom properties defined. TDIPA.M1 PASS: no chart-library refs. TDIPA.M2 PASS: renderSparkline produces inline SVG with polyline+circle. TDIPB.M1 PASS: <script type="module" src="app.js">. TDIPB.M2 PASS: no bundler artifacts. TDIPC.M1 PASS: no CSS-framework refs. Live runtime IPs (S1.A2 fetch behavior, S5.A2/3/4 30-team render) deferred to CV per edge-case-testing report — same as TD-declared deferred set.
state/escalations/sev0-fixes/ is empty. No trivial-fix records to verify. Clean.

All 6 sections have acceptance_assertions[] covering each acceptance phrase. S1: 5 assertions (function exports, real HTTP, normalized shape, fetch-isolation, named error). S2: 5 assertions (export, return shape, empty-team handling, determinism, no HTTP/DOM). S3: 5 assertions (export, 6 division keys, sort order, wildCard 2 keys × top-3, no HTTP/DOM). S4: 4 assertions (5 required IDs, module script tag, no CDN deps, ≥30 --team-* vars). S5: 7 assertions (init export, 30-team rankings, 30-team trends, 7-day schedule, error-banner state, empty-state copy, last-updated text). S6: 4 assertions (http server, 3 scenarios, all S1-S5 ECT assertions evaluated, non-zero exit on failure). PNV.1 plus 7 first-contact requirements all bound. No acceptance phrase orphaned.

44 discovery_coverage_assertions sampled: restatement (DCA.restatement.1), 11 assumptions (DCA.A1-A11), 15 OOS items (DCA.OOS.*), 8 IPs (DCA.IP1-IP8), 2 proper nouns (DCA.PN.1-2), 7 first-contact requirements (DCA.FC.1-7) — sum=44 matching the TD report. Every coverage-required field has at least one assertion whose covers field points back to it. Spot-check verified DCA.restatement.1 → ledger-v1.json#restatement; DCA.OOS.players → out_of_scope[5]; DCA.IP6 → inflection_points[5]; DCA.PN.1 → proper_nouns[0]; DCA.FC.4 → first_contact_requirements[3]. Coverage graph closed.
state/inline-deviations/ is empty. No deviations to audit. Clean.
